queries.question: Show all the steakhouses, then show the seafood restaurants which have been open since 1980.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurants.Name 
FROM Restaurants
WHERE Restaurants.Type = "Steakhouse" OR Restaurants.Type = "Seafood Restaurant" AND Restaurants.Year_of_Establishment = 1980
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurants p:name ?name .
  ?restaurants p:Type ?type_w .
  ?restaurants p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?restaurants p:Year_of_Establishment ?year_of_establishment_w .
  FILTER((STR(?type_w) = "Steakhouse" || (STR(?type_w2) = "Seafood Restaurant" && (STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "1980" || STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "1980.0"))))
}

queries.question: Show all steakhouses and seafood restaurants which were established in 1980.
queries.sql:
SELECT Restaurants.Name 
FROM Restaurants
WHERE (Restaurants.Type = "Steakhouse" OR Restaurants.Type = "Seafood Restaurant") AND Restaurants.Year_of_Establishment = 1980
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?restaurants a :Restaurants .
  ?restaurants p:name ?name .
  ?restaurants p:Type ?type_w .
  ?restaurants p:Type ?type_w2 .
  ?restaurants p:Year_of_Establishment ?year_of_establishment_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_w) = "Steakhouse" || STR(?type_w2) = "Seafood Restaurant")) && (STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "1980" || STR(?year_of_establishment_w) = "1980.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show all steakhouses and seafood restaurants which were established in 1980.
